title: Property Consultant - Runwal Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Runwal Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Runwal Group in Delhi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Runwal Group:
Runwal Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Runwal Group!
